Klasse PluginsMessages

java.lang.Object
org.quurz.plugins.localisation.PluginsMessages
public class PluginsMessages extends Object

Provides localized messages for the plugin system.

This class uses a ResourceBundle to retrieve messages in the current locale.

Seit:
1.0.0

  • Methodendetails

    • pluginManagerAlreadyInitialised

      public static String pluginManagerAlreadyInitialised()

    • pluginManagerNotInitialised

      public static String pluginManagerNotInitialised()

      Returns a message indicating that the plugin manager has not been initialised.

      Gibt zurück:
      the localized error message
      Seit:
      1.0.0

    • unableToCreateBaseDirectory

      public static String unableToCreateBaseDirectory(Path directory)

      Returns a message indicating that the base directory could not be created.

      Parameter:
      directory - the path of the directory that could not be created; must not be null
      Gibt zurück:
      the localized error message
      Seit:
      1.0.0

    • unableToCreatePluginDirectory

      public static String unableToCreatePluginDirectory(Path directory)

      Returns a message indicating that a plugin-specific directory could not be created.

      Parameter:
      directory - the path of the directory that could not be created; must not be null
      Gibt zurück:
      the localized error message
      Seit:
      1.0.0

    • unableToStorePlugin

      public static String unableToStorePlugin(@NonNull PluginId pluginId)

      Returns a message indicating that a plugin could not be stored.

      Parameter:
      pluginId - the unique identifier of the plugin; must not be null
      Gibt zurück:
      the localized error message
      Seit:
      1.0.0

    • unableToFindPlugin

      public static String unableToFindPlugin(@NonNull PluginId pluginId)

      Returns a message indicating that a plugin could not be found.

      Parameter:
      pluginId - the unique identifier of the plugin; must not be null
      Gibt zurück:
      the localized error message
      Seit:
      1.0.0

    • unableToRetrievePlugin

      public static String unableToRetrievePlugin(@NonNull PluginId pluginId)

      Returns a message indicating that a plugin could not be retrieved from the repository.

      Parameter:
      pluginId - the unique identifier of the plugin; must not be null
      Gibt zurück:
      the localized error message
      Seit:
      1.0.0

    • unableToRemovePlugin

      public static String unableToRemovePlugin(@NonNull PluginId pluginId)

      Returns a message indicating that a plugin could not be removed from the repository.

      Parameter:
      pluginId - the unique identifier of the plugin; must not be null
      Gibt zurück:
      the localized error message
      Seit:
      1.0.0

    • unableToCreateClassLoader

      public static String unableToCreateClassLoader()

      Returns a message indicating that a class loader for the plugin could not be created.

      Gibt zurück:
      the localized error message
      Seit:
      1.0.0

    • unableToCreatePlugin

      public static String unableToCreatePlugin()

      Returns a message indicating that a plugin instance could not be created.

      Gibt zurück:
      the localized error message
      Seit:
      1.0.0
